zh.lifeSummary: 當Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein於1115年出生時，他的父親Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein44歲，母親Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein28歲。他和Mathilde von Thüringen至少有1個兒子。他去世於1164年7月6日在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫德米維陳享年49歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 明登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein于1115年出生时，他的父亲Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein44岁，母亲Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein28岁。他和Mathilde von Thüringen至少有1个儿子。他去世于1164年7月6日在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫德米維陳享年49岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 明登。

nameMeanings.name: Holstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from the province of Holstein, long disputed between Germany and Denmark. This gets its name from holsten, the dative plural, originally used after a preposition, of holst, from Middle Low German holt-sate ‘dweller in the woods’ (from Middle Low German holt ‘wood’ + sate, sete ‘tenant’). The final syllable has been erroneously altered by analogy with North German Steen ‘stone’, which in South German and standard German has the form Stein.

variants.name: Hulstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Albertus, Kees.
Dutch vowel variant of German   Holstein  .

variants.name: Hollstein
meanings: Mainly Norwegian: from an Old Norse personal name from hallr ‘rock’ + steinn ‘stone’.

variants.name: Holst
meanings: Altered form, first recorded in the 15th century, of the Old Saxon name Horsa ‘horse’.

variants.name: Holsten
meanings: North German: variant of   Holstein   or   Holst  .

en.lifeSummary: When Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein was born in 1115, his father, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, was 44 and his mother, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Mathilde von Thüringen. He died on 6 July 1164, in Verchen, Demmin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, at the age of 49, and was buried in Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein est né en 1115, son père, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mathilde von Thüringen. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1164, à Verchen, Demmin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein 1115 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein 44 und seine Mutter Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein 28. Er hatte mit Mathilde von Thüringen mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 6. Juli 1164 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Verchen, Demmin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland und wurde in Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein è nato il nel 1115, il suo padre, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mathilde von Thüringen. Morì il 6 luglio 1164, nel Verchen, Demmin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holsteinが1115年に生まれた時，父Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holsteinは44歳，母Hildewa Gräfin von Holsteinは28歳であった。彼はMathilde von Thüringenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1164年7月6日にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンデンミンバーチェンで49歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンクレイス ミンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein(이)가 1115년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Mathilde von Thüringen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1164년 7월 6일 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 데민 베르천에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 민든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein nasceu em 1115, seu pai, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mathilde von Thüringen. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1164, em Verchen, Demmin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein родился в 1115 г., его отцу по имени Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mathilde von Thüringen. Он умер 6 июля 1164 г. в местности вирчэн, демминь, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mathilde von Thüringen. Murió el 6 de julio de 1164, en Verchen, Demmin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemania.
